impact: This gives the next daemon worker a deterministic recovery path: repair filename/path classification before retrying the draft audit-ledger task, keep the retry file set small, and require py_compile-safe Python before full validation so the daemon can resume accepted patches instead of spinning on the same failure.
summary: Tighten supervisor recovery guidance for the two observed failure modes: private-artifact preflight false positives and Python syntax-preflight rollbacks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 3 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
